title: Calcified Cultist
move_pattern: Starts with Incantation (gains 2 Ritual), then uses Dark Strike every turn indefinitely.
notes: Uses Ritual Power, gaining 2 Ritual on the first turn. Each stack of Ritual grants +1 Strength at the end of each turn, so 2 Ritual = +2 Strength per turn. Dark Strike's effective damage grows by 2 each turn.
